commit.message:
8372151: Lilliput: Fix clone_in_runtime size computation for compact headers

clone_in_runtime recomputed the base offset from arraycopy_payload_base_offset()
which returns 4 for compact header instances (pre-pre-copy value). But clone()
already bumped this to 8 after emitting a 4-byte pre-copy, and the ArrayCopyNode
stores offset=8. This caused 4 >> 3 = 0 instead of 8 >> 3 = 1, making the
runtime clone under-copy by 1 HeapWord.

Fix by using the ArrayCopyNode's stored offset (the correct post-bump value)
instead of re-deriving it from arraycopy_payload_base_offset().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
